mnemonics.title: PKI Components
mnemonics.content: CAs ROCK: Certificates, Authorities, Registration, OCSP, CRL, Key management

acronyms.usage: List of revoked certificates maintained by CA

visualTips.visualization: Imagine nested Russian dolls: Root CA > Intermediate CA > End-entity certificate

analogies.analogy: Like a passport - issued by trusted authority (CA), contains identity info, and has security features (signature)
